race.comment: Going with SO BRAVE (1) who has the ability to win this. He's only second up here going from 1600m to 2500m which is interesting, but the stable can typically get them fit at home, and he did win dominantly over this route before the break. Recent trial at Hamilton was solid over the jumps and he'll be hard to hold out. RAINBOW DELIGHT (2) struggled in tougher grade in town last time but had been good prior at Cranbourne over 2080m, beaten a head. He'll roll forward and take catching. SHREWSBURY ROAD (10) is racing well this time in, getting home fairly well over this route behind TOPSPIN (13) last time out. TOPSPIN was big odds there but might be able to go on with it.
